# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-cluster-role-binding
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd
 subjects:
 - kind: ServiceAccount
   name: linkerd
   namespace: linkerd

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceMeshPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  meshConfig: {}
  serverPolicy:
    prometheus:
      allowed: []
      denied:
      - from: "*"
        to:
          namespaceSelector:
            matchExpressions:
            - key: k8s-app
              operator: In
              values:
              - linkerd
              - kube-system
  authPolicy:
    services:
    - name: myservice1
      rules:
        - to: "*"
          jwt: {}
    - name: myservice2
      rules:
        - to: "*"
          tls: {}
